response.justification: Bogdan possesses an incredibly strong technical background with over 15 years of software development experience, including extensive work in developer tooling, test automation, and mobile platforms. However, the target role is a Level II Engineering Manager requiring full-time people leadership, and his resume lacks any explicit experience in formal people management, conducting 1:1s, or performance evaluations.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience across diverse tech stacks.
Direct experience building developer tools, CI/CD pipelines, and test automation frameworks.
Proven technical leadership as a Staff Engineer, Founder, and open-source contributor.
concerns: Lacks the minimum requirement of 2 years in formal people management.
No demonstrated experience conducting 1:1s, performance reviews, or managing team HR duties.
Career trajectory is strongly aligned with an Individual Contributor (IC) path rather than organizational management.
